channel.title: Whamcloud Community JIRA
channel.description: This file is an XML representation of an issue

item.title: [LU-20155] improve lfs_setstripe admin restrict
item.description:
LU-17628 only covers some code paths to file striping.

the same group access restrictions should also be applied to stripes set on directories, PFL, swap_layout, and direct to the xattr.

we're using a similar patch with 2.15.8, but this patch is against main/master.

status.description: The issue is open and ready for the assignee to start work on it.

comments.comment:
the functionality to allow only a privileged group or users to use lfs setstripe, PFL, etc. is incomplete in master and b2_15.
currently there are multiple ways available to users to still set striping.

the patch I made for master and b2_15 is basically the same.

however I think I've stuffed up somehow 'cos we're seeing occasional client LBUG's related to attrs

<ConMan> Console [d63] log at 2026-04-20 19:00:00 AEST.

2026-04-20 19:57:28 [73643.695586] ? set_next_entity+0xda/0x150
2026-04-20 19:57:28 [73643.699608] osc_check_rpcs+0x335/0x3c0 [osc]
2026-04-20 19:57:28 [73643.703986] osc_io_unplug0+0x75/0x90 [osc]
2026-04-20 19:57:28 [73643.708186] brw_queue_work+0x2f/0xd0 [osc]
2026-04-20 19:57:28 [73643.712390] work_interpreter+0x32/0x170 [ptlrpc]
2026-04-20 19:57:28 [73643.717221] ptlrpc_check_set+0x414/0x1ea0 [ptlrpc]
2026-04-20 19:57:28 [73643.722166] ? srso_alias_return_thunk+0x5/0xfbef5
2026-04-20 19:57:28 [73643.726958] ? schedule+0x2c/0xb0
2026-04-20 19:57:28 [73643.730279] ptlrpcd_check+0x3d5/0x5d0 [ptlrpc]
2026-04-20 19:57:28 [73643.734875] ptlrpcd+0x20c/0x4a0 [ptlrpc]
2026-04-20 19:57:28 [73643.738956] ? __pfx_woken_wake_function+0x10/0x10
2026-04-20 19:57:28 [73643.743747] ? __pfx_ptlrpcd+0x10/0x10 [ptlrpc]
2026-04-20 19:57:28 [73643.748339] kthread+0x104/0x110
2026-04-20 19:57:28 [73643.751571] ? __pfx_kthread+0x10/0x10
2026-04-20 19:57:28 [73643.755327] ret_from_fork+0x2b/0x50
2026-04-20 19:57:28 [73643.758907] </TASK>
2026-04-20 19:57:28 [73643.767362] Kernel Offset: 0x3800000 from 0xffffffff81000000 (relocation range: 0xffffffff80000000-0xffffffffbfffffff)
2026-04-20 19:57:28 [73643.840257] --[ end Kernel panic - not syncing: LBUG ]--

so I'm removing the patch from our production machines for now.

cheers,
robin

Do you mean the current master codebase does not cover the code paths adequately? Or just in b2_15 branch?

If you ar using a modified patch, consider uploading it to gerrit for review?
